olympus_guylos.description: The Empire is planning a secret weapon that could shift the balance of power forever. As a new recruit, report to headquarters and join the operation.

report_to_imperial_hq.description: Head to the Imperial recruitment headquarters and register as a new recruit.
report_to_imperial_hq.name: Imperial Enlistment

olympus_guylos.name: The Beast of Olympus

olympus_threat.description: Intelligence suggests the Guylos Empire is mobilizing for something big. As a new member of the Republic, report to camp and help uncover what they're planning.

report_to_republican_camp.description: Head to the Republican camp and report for duty. Major Arthur has already put in a good word for you.
report_to_republican_camp.name: Reporting to the Republic

olympus_threat.name: The Olympus Threat

shells_of_time.description: A father researching Zoids, a mysterious Dr T, and a family torn apart. Head to Porto Nido to find answers.

fight_arcadia_guard.description: The guard has turned aggressive. Calm him down by defeating him in battle.
fight_arcadia_guard.name: What Did I Say?

head_to_porto_nido.description: The girl's father is in Porto Nido. Head south to find him and warn him about the pursuers.
head_to_porto_nido.name: The Road to Porto Nido

clear_ruins.description: Dr. T said Kara's father is deep inside the Sommerso Ruins. Complete a sortie to reach him.
clear_ruins.name: Into the Deep

meet_dr_t.description: A mysterious man appeared after the fight and calmed the guard down. Talk to him and find out what he knows.
meet_dr_t.name: The Guard Whisperer

meet_father.description: You've reached the heart of the ruins. Talk to Dr. Thrun and deliver his daughter safely.
meet_father.name: Last Mile

shells_of_time.name: Breaking the Shell

sleeper_commander.description: Gleam Village is under attack by Zoids Sleepers. Prove your skill as a pilot and uncover the culprits.

beat_bandit.description: You found an abandoned camp where a bandit is holding hostages. Defeat him and rescue them.
beat_bandit.name: Save the Girl, Save the World

captain_farewell.description: Now that you have reinforcements, report back to the captain in the village before heading out.
captain_farewell.name: Time to Depart

check_colony_uproar.description: Something is happening at Wind Colony. Go back and check what's going on.
check_colony_uproar.name: Uproar at the Colony

check_van_colony.description: Go to Wind Colony and ask Maria how Van is doing.
check_van_colony.name: Where's Van?

defeat_bianco_nero.description: Blu's reinforcements have arrived. Van can't escape alone. Sortie into the ruins and hold off the bandits while Van gets out.
defeat_bianco_nero.name: Wolves at the Gate

defeat_bul.description: The bandits mentioned Blu, who's trying to get rid of a boy. Help Van by stopping Blu and his Guysack in a sortie through the Elmia Ruins.
defeat_bul.name: Protector

deliver_girl.description: Take the girl back to her mother in Gleam Village.
deliver_girl.name: The Road Home

elmia_desert_patrol.description: Maria says her brother Van is somewhere in the Elmia Desert. Fight through the Sleepers to find him.
elmia_desert_patrol.name: Desert Ruins

ambush_arcobaleno.description: The bandits will try to double-cross the exchange. Don't let them. Ambush them at their camp and defeat Bianco, Nero, and Blu.
ambush_arcobaleno.name: Ambush

fight_rosso.description: Rosso and his Red Horn stand between you and the captive. Face him.
fight_rosso.name: The Red Horn

fight_rosso_rematch.description: Rosso's Red Horn has been weakened by the blast. This is your chance. Finish the fight.
fight_rosso_rematch.name: Turning the Tide

fight_van.description: Van challenges you to a one-on-one battle with his Shield Liger. Prove you're strong enough to change his mind.
fight_van.name: The Shield of the Loved Ones

find_van.description: That will hold Blu off for a few minutes. Find Van in the ruins and warn him about the incoming bandits.
find_van.name: The Boy in the Ruins

find_van_oasis.description: Van is at the Wind Oasis. Talk to him before he leaves for good.
find_van_oasis.name: One Last Talk

grow_army.description: You'll need more Zoids if you plan to face the bandits. Use Jenkins' lab to incubate at least another Zoid for your army.
grow_army.name: Recruitment

hone_skills.description: There are many Zoids Sleepers in the village outskirts, perfect for honing your piloting skills.
hone_skills.name: Field Training

interrogate_bandits.description: The bandits might know where the girl was taken. Interrogate Bianco.
interrogate_bandits.name: Truth Among Thieves

jenkins_to_work.description: You've gathered Zoid structural data. Head back to the village with Jenkins and start working in his lab.
jenkins_to_work.name: That's How Babies Are Made

listen_to_bandits.description: You found some ruins in the desert. There are bandits nearby. Listen to what they're saying.
listen_to_bandits.name: Voices Among Ruins

maria_van_status.description: Ask Maria at Wind Colony how Van and the mysterious girl are doing.
maria_van_status.name: What Was That About?

obtain_zi_data.description: Scan a Zoid Sleeper's Core to obtain structural data. Use the Core Analyzer and a Probe.
obtain_zi_data.name: Zoid Anatomy

repel_attackers.description: Viola, Verde and Giallo are attacking Wind Colony. Van won't make it in time. Repel them!
repel_attackers.name: Colony Under Siege

report_to_captain.description: The old captain might know more about this artifact. Talk to him in the village.
report_to_captain.name: Mission Report

scout_arcobaleno.description: You saw which way the bandits fled. Fight through the Bandit Trail to their base and investigate what they're planning.
scout_arcobaleno.name: Into the Wolves' Den

return_to_colony_leon.description: Return to Wind Colony and talk to Father Leon about the situation.
return_to_colony_leon.name: A Difficult Choice

rosso_confrontation.description: The leader of the bandits, Rosso, reveals himself. Hear what he has to say.
rosso_confrontation.name: The Boss

talk_to_boy.description: There's a boy in the village who looks desperate. Talk to him.
talk_to_boy.name: Village in Peril

talk_to_van_and_fiona.description: Head through the Dustwind Trail to the Wind Oasis and talk to Van and Fine. They might have useful information.
talk_to_van_and_fiona.name: Desert Intel

talk_to_girl.description: The girl the bandits were holding is safe now. Talk to her.
talk_to_girl.name: The Captive

talk_to_hostage.description: The bandit fled, but the hostage seems shaken. Talk to her.
talk_to_hostage.name: Hostage

talk_to_jenkins.description: The captain mentioned old Jenkins, a former Zoid lab researcher. Find him and show him the Sleeper module.
talk_to_jenkins.name: Old Jenkins

talk_to_maria.description: The priest mentioned a boy who keeps getting into trouble with the bandits. Talk to his sister Maria Flyheight.
talk_to_maria.name: The Boy from Planet Zi

talk_to_priest_leon.description: You've arrived at Wind Colony. Ask the local priest if he knows anything about the missing girl.
talk_to_priest_leon.name: Prayer to the Wind

tell_van_kidnapping.description: Go to the Wind Oasis and tell Van that the bandits kidnapped Maria.
tell_van_kidnapping.name: Bad News

talk_to_van_tied.description: The villagers tied Van up and locked him in a warehouse. Talk to him through the window to figure out a plan.
talk_to_van_tied.name: Captive Ally

sleeper_commander.name: Sleeper Commander
